'''Aeramaxis Technologies''' was a small manufacturing company that produced personal equipment.<ref name="GFT" /> The company's products included the [[Evasive-13 individual field disruptor]], the [[Evasive-226-R]],<ref name="EGWT" /> and the [[PDW-50 Ionic Tingler]].<ref name="GFT" />
